meta.narrative: This store scores 63.6/100 (Grade B) on AI representation quality across 30 products. 8 critical issue(s) mean some products are completely invisible to AI shopping agents regardless of search query. AI agents are missing approximately 38% of potential search traffic due to weak metadata signals (retrieval score: 62.4/100 — MEDIUM). The single highest-ROI fix is 'IMAGE_MISSING' — affects 21/30 products and is the most common reason AI agents skip this store's catalogue. Fixing the top 3 issues store-wide would significantly improve AI discoverability without requiring any new products or design changes.

storeInsights.title: IMAGE_MISSING affects 21/30 products
storeInsights.detail: This single issue is the biggest drag on your store's AI visibility. Fixing it store-wide would have the highest ROI.
storeInsights.action: Add at least 3 product images — front view, back view, and in-use/lifestyle shot.

storeInsights.title: Store retrieval score is 62.4/100 — AI agents are missing 38% of potential traffic
storeInsights.detail: Even when customers search for products you carry, AI shopping agents may not surface them due to weak metadata.
storeInsights.action: Prioritize: tags → descriptions → SEO titles. In that order.

storeInsights.title: SEO titles and descriptions are missing store-wide
storeInsights.detail: 30/30 products are missing SEO metadata. This is a 30-minute fix with outsized AI search impact.
storeInsights.action: Use Shopify bulk editor: Products → Export → edit SEO columns → reimport.

storeInsights.title: POLICY_RETURN_MISSING: No return/refund policy found. AI shopping agents flag store...
storeInsights.detail: Store-level policy gap — affects all products' AI trustworthiness.
storeInsights.action: Add or expand this policy in Shopify Admin → Settings → Policies

storeInsights.title: POLICY_SHIPPING_MISSING: No shipping policy found. AI agents answering 'when will my ...
storeInsights.detail: Store-level policy gap — affects all products' AI trustworthiness.
storeInsights.action: Add or expand this policy in Shopify Admin → Settings → Policies

storeInsights.title: TRUST_BRAND_INCONSISTENT: Store has 12 different vendor names. AI agents prefer stores...
storeInsights.detail: Trust signal missing — reduces AI recommendation confidence store-wide.
storeInsights.action: Store has 12 different vendor names. AI agents prefer stores with consistent brand identity.

roiRanking.conversionImpact: No images = 40-60% lower conversion rate — customers and AI agents skip imageless products.
No category = excluded from category browse and AI routing — critical gap.
No SEO title = raw product title used in search snippets — often poorly formatted.
Thin descriptions lose to competitors with rich content — est. 25% lower conversion.
No meta description = AI generates its own snippet — usually lower quality.
No use-case = cannot match intent queries like 'office shoes' or 'gym bag'.
Missing material = excluded from material-based filters like 'cotton shirts' — 20-40% of apparel queries.
Tag-description mismatch signals inconsistent metadata — reduces AI confidence.
Vague phrases signal low quality to AI rankers — filtered before customer sees product.
Without specs, product cannot rank in 'best X under Y' queries — high commercial-intent traffic missed.

products.title: Sunscreen SPF 50
products.interpretation: AI classifies this as 'Skincare' with 80% confidence. No conflicting signals. Description present but too thin for attribute extraction.

quickWins.problem: No product images — vision AI agents cannot verify this product.
quickWins.fix: Add at least 3 product images — front view, back view, and in-use/lifestyle shot.
quickWins.impact: Images are the #1 trust signal for AI shopping agents. Without them, the product is invisible to vision-capable AI systems.

quickWins.problem: Only 14 words. Minimum 20 needed for AI context.
quickWins.fix: Expand description to at least 50 words. Include: material, dimensions, use-case, target user, key feature.
quickWins.impact: Short descriptions lack the signal density AI needs for intent matching and feature extraction.

allRecommendations.problem: No product images — vision AI agents cannot verify this product.
allRecommendations.fix: Add at least 3 product images — front view, back view, and in-use/lifestyle shot.
allRecommendations.impact: Images are the #1 trust signal for AI shopping agents. Without them, the product is invisible to vision-capable AI systems.

allRecommendations.problem: Only 14 words. Minimum 20 needed for AI context.
allRecommendations.fix: Expand description to at least 50 words. Include: material, dimensions, use-case, target user, key feature.
allRecommendations.impact: Short descriptions lack the signal density AI needs for intent matching and feature extraction.

allRecommendations.problem: Only 2 tag(s) — recommend at least 3 for retrieval coverage.
allRecommendations.fix: Expand to at least 5 tags covering: category, material, use-case, gender/age target, occasion.
allRecommendations.impact: Sparse tags narrow retrieval coverage — product misses adjacent intent queries.

allRecommendations.problem: No SEO title — AI search agents fall back to raw product title, often poorly formatted.
allRecommendations.fix: Set a custom SEO title: '[Product Name] - [Key Attribute] | [Brand]'. Example: 'Cotton Kurta Shirt - Breathable Ethnic Wear | FabricIndia'
allRecommendations.impact: AI search agents (Google Shopping, Bing) use SEO title for snippet generation. Missing = raw title used, often poorly formatted.

allRecommendations.problem: No SEO meta description — AI commerce agents generate lower-quality snippets.
allRecommendations.fix: Write a 150-160 character SEO description summarising: what it is, who it's for, key benefit.
allRecommendations.impact: AI commerce agents use meta description for product summaries in search results.

quickWins.problem: Conflicting seasonal signals — AI receives contradictory intent context.
quickWins.fix: Align title and description to the same season/context. If it's a winter jacket, remove all summer/beach/cool references from the description.
quickWins.impact: Contradictory signals cause AI to filter the product from BOTH seasonal query sets.

allRecommendations.impact: Material is the primary filter in apparel AI queries — 'cotton shirts', 'leather bags' etc.

quickWins.impact: Images are the #1 trust signal for AI shopping agents. Without them, the product is invisible to vision-capable AI systems.

quickWins.problem: Only 10 words. Minimum 20 needed for AI context.
quickWins.fix: Expand description to at least 50 words. Include: material, dimensions, use-case, target user, key feature.
quickWins.impact: Short descriptions lack the signal density AI needs for intent matching and feature extraction.

allRecommendations.problem: No product images — vision AI agents cannot verify this product.
allRecommendations.fix: Add at least 3 product images — front view, back view, and in-use/lifestyle shot.
allRecommendations.impact: Images are the #1 trust signal for AI shopping agents. Without them, the product is invisible to vision-capable AI systems.

allRecommendations.problem: Only 10 words. Minimum 20 needed for AI context.
allRecommendations.fix: Expand description to at least 50 words. Include: material, dimensions, use-case, target user, key feature.
allRecommendations.impact: Short descriptions lack the signal density AI needs for intent matching and feature extraction.

allRecommendations.problem: No SEO title — AI search agents fall back to raw product title, often poorly formatted.
allRecommendations.fix: Set a custom SEO title: '[Product Name] - [Key Attribute] | [Brand]'. Example: 'Cotton Kurta Shirt - Breathable Ethnic Wear | FabricIndia'
allRecommendations.impact: AI search agents (Google Shopping, Bing) use SEO title for snippet generation. Missing = raw title used, often poorly formatted.

allRecommendations.problem: No SEO meta description — AI commerce agents generate lower-quality snippets.
allRecommendations.fix: Write a 150-160 character SEO description summarising: what it is, who it's for, key benefit.
allRecommendations.impact: AI commerce agents use meta description for product summaries in search results.

allRecommendations.problem: Electronics product has no measurable specs (GB, W, mAh, etc). AI cannot rank in comparison queries.
allRecommendations.fix: Add measurable specs: battery (mAh/hours), storage (GB), weight (g/kg), dimensions (mm/cm), wattage (W).
allRecommendations.impact: Electronics without specs cannot surface in 'best laptop under X' or comparison queries.
